title: Youtube Poop: Maybe you should take charge of the poops...
description:
YTP Tennis - GreatBritishTurd Vs. MarkieV101 - ROUND 1, FIGHT!

Channel Report unmysteriously disappears form the radar as it is flooded with information. Meanwhile Commissar Holt destroys the 'Planetary Overlord' for uploading another Mama Lugi poop instead of the Commissar's My Little [Rending] Pony poop...

Other than that, no real story, just seeing how far I can push Motion 2.0. Alas not far enough! :P

Clips include:
Warhammer Epic 40k; Final Liberation
300
Channel Report
My Little Pony
